touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn outreach to Taylor Lima introducing our revenue intelligence platform and its forecasting capabilities. No response received.
Follow-up LinkedIn message to Taylor Lima highlighting case study with similar SaaS company improving forecast accuracy by 34%. No response received.
Cold call attempt to Taylor Lima. Left voicemail introducing solution and mentioning forecasting pain points common in high-growth SaaS orgs. No callback received.
Brief connection call with Taylor Lima. Confirmed interest in improving forecast accuracy ahead of board meetings. Scheduled qualification call for next week.

questions_asked.question: Are you currently using any revenue intelligence tools?
questions_asked.answer: We've looked at Chorus but haven't committed to anything yet.

next_steps: Schedule 30-minute qualification call
Send calendar invite with agenda

touches.ai_summary: Qualification call with Taylor Lima, Director of Sales. Discussed current forecasting challenges, manual processes causing 20%+ variance in quarterly predictions. Taylor mentioned evaluating Chorus but concerned about implementation complexity. Confirmed budget authority with CRO Riley Stern. Timeline: decision by end of quarter.

questions_asked.question: What's driving the need to improve forecasting now?
questions_asked.answer: Board wants more predictable revenue numbers. Last two quarters we missed forecast by significant margins.

questions_asked.question: Who else needs to be involved in the evaluation?
questions_asked.answer: Riley Stern, our CRO, will make final call. Also need buy-in from account management team.

questions_asked.question: How does your platform differ from Chorus in terms of forecast accuracy?
questions_asked.answer: Our AI analyzes deal health signals across multiple dimensions, not just call recordings. We integrate pipeline data, email engagement, and buyer behavior patterns.

next_steps: Send ROI calculator and case studies
Schedule technical overview call
Introduce to customer success for implementation questions

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up qualification call with Taylor Lima to review ROI projections. Discussed team size (25 revenue team members) and automation requirements. Taylor expressed interest in unlimited automation tier. Clarified integration needs with existing Salesforce instance.

questions_asked.question: What's the typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers are live within 2-3 weeks with basic setup, 4-6 weeks for full customization.

questions_asked.question: What specific automation workflows are most important to you?
questions_asked.answer: Auto-logging calls and emails, deal health scoring, and forecast rollup reports for Riley.

next_steps: Prepare discovery call agenda
Get Salesforce org details for integration planning

touches.ai_summary: Discovery follow-up with Taylor Lima to map out current tech stack and pain points. Discussed challenges with Salesforce data quality and manual deal updates. Taylor mentioned Mateus Schneider and Leo Yoon should evaluate technical aspects.

questions_asked.question: What percentage of your deals have accurate close dates in Salesforce today?
questions_asked.answer: Maybe 60%? Reps don't update regularly enough, which kills our forecast reliability.

questions_asked.question: Can your system automatically update deal stages based on activity?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can configure triggers based on email responses, meeting outcomes, and engagement patterns.

next_steps: Include Mateus Schneider and Leo Yoon in deep-dive discovery
Schedule technical evaluation session

touches.ai_summary: Deep discovery call with Taylor Lima covering detailed workflow requirements. Discussed current forecast variance (23% average miss), manual reporting burden (10+ hours/week for Taylor's team), and competitive evaluation with Chorus. Taylor noted Chorus pricing seemed high for feature set.

questions_asked.question: What would success look like 6 months after implementation?
questions_asked.answer: Forecast variance under 10%, automated deal scoring saving my team at least 8 hours weekly, and Riley trusting our numbers again.

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Chorus?
questions_asked.answer: We're typically 20-30% more cost-effective for similar seat counts, especially with our unlimited automation tier.

objections: Need to make sure this doesn't add complexity for the account management team.
next_steps: Prepare demo tailored to forecasting and automation use cases
Send competitive comparison with Chorus

touches.ai_summary: Product demo for Taylor Lima focusing on forecast accuracy features. Walked through AI-powered deal scoring, automated activity capture, and real-time pipeline health dashboards. Taylor engaged positively with automation workflows and asked detailed questions about Salesforce sync.

questions_asked.question: Can we customize the deal health scoring criteria?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely. You can weight factors like response time, stakeholder engagement, and deal velocity based on your historical win patterns.

questions_asked.question: How accurate is the sentiment analysis on calls?
questions_asked.answer: Our models are trained on millions of B2B conversations with 87% accuracy on buyer intent classification.

questions_asked.question: What data do you need from us to train the model on our deals?
questions_asked.answer: Historical won/lost deals from past 12-18 months with activities and outcomes.

next_steps: Schedule extended demo with Mateus and Leo
Provide trial access for Taylor to test with sample data

touches.ai_summary: Extended demo with Taylor Lima, Mateus Schneider, and Leo Yoon covering technical implementation and account management workflows. Mateus asked detailed questions about data privacy and API rate limits. Leo focused on change management and user adoption. Demonstrated Chorus comparison showing stronger automation capabilities and integration flexibility.

questions_asked.question: What's your data retention policy and where is data stored?
questions_asked.answer: 12-month retention standard, 24-month available. Data hosted on AWS US-East with SOC 2 Type II compliance.

questions_asked.question: How much training is needed for the account management team?
questions_asked.answer: Most users are productive within 1-2 onboarding sessions. We provide live training and self-serve resources.

questions_asked.question: Based on what you've seen, does this solve your forecasting challenge?
questions_asked.answer: Definitely addresses the core issue. Need to understand pricing and get Riley's sign-off.

questions_asked.question: How does this compare to Chorus for our specific use case?
questions_asked.answer: Chorus focuses heavily on conversation intelligence, but you need broader deal health signals and automation, which is our strength.

objections: Want to make sure we're not overpaying compared to Chorus if they come back with aggressive pricing.
next_steps: Prepare proposal for 25 seats with unlimited automation
Schedule proposal review call with Taylor
Plan exec meeting with Riley Stern

touches.ai_summary: Proposal review call with Taylor Lima. Presented pricing for 25 seats at $19,600 ACV with unlimited automation tier. Taylor expressed concern about budget and requested discount to match internal expectations. Mentioned Chorus quote was lower than expected.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing given we're a multi-year commitment prospect?
questions_asked.answer: We can discuss volume discounts or extended terms. What budget range were you targeting?

questions_asked.question: What would make this a no-brainer decision for Riley?
questions_asked.answer: If we can get this under $15K annually and show clear ROI on forecast improvement, Riley will approve.

objections: Pricing is higher than the budget Riley initially allocated for this category.
next_steps: Discuss discount options internally
Schedule pricing negotiation call
Prepare ROI justification for Riley

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email to Taylor Lima with revised proposal including 25% discount to bring ACV to target range. Highlighted ROI calculation showing $78K annual value from time savings and forecast accuracy improvements. Requested feedback before Riley meeting.

questions_asked.question: Does the revised pricing work within your budget constraints?
questions_asked.answer: This is much closer. I'll review with Riley before our call next week.

next_steps: Wait for Taylor's feedback on revised proposal
Prepare for Riley exec meeting

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call with Taylor Lima to finalize commercial terms. Discussed revised proposal with 25.3% discount. Taylor confirmed budget alignment but requested confirmation on implementation support and SLA guarantees. Addressed concerns about switching costs from current process.

questions_asked.question: What level of implementation support is included at this price?
questions_asked.answer: Full onboarding with dedicated CSM, custom workflow configuration, and 90-day optimization reviews.

questions_asked.question: Can we lock in this pricing for a two-year term?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can guarantee no price increase for two years with annual commitment.

questions_asked.question: What if adoption is slower than expected in the first quarter?
questions_asked.answer: Our CSM will work closely with your team. We also have success metrics checkpoints at 30-60-90 days.

objections: Want to ensure we're not locked into something that doesn't deliver results quickly.
next_steps: Schedule exec meeting with Riley Stern
Send final contract with agreed terms
Prepare implementation timeline

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting with Riley Stern (CRO) and Taylor Lima. Presented business case focused on forecast accuracy improvement and revenue predictability. Riley asked pointed questions about ROI timeline and competitive differentiation vs Chorus. Expressed concern about team adoption and change management.

questions_asked.question: How quickly will we see improvement in forecast accuracy?
questions_asked.answer: Most customers see measurable improvement within first quarter as the AI learns your deal patterns.

questions_asked.question: Why should we choose you over Chorus given they're the market leader?
questions_asked.answer: Chorus excels at conversation intelligence, but your core need is forecast accuracy through comprehensive deal health signals and automation, which is our differentiator.

questions_asked.question: What's your confidence level this solves our board reporting problem?
questions_asked.answer: Based on similar customers, we've seen 40-60% reduction in forecast variance within two quarters.

objections: Concerned about getting the team to actually use this consistently.
next_steps: Riley to review final proposal with finance
Taylor to coordinate implementation planning with Mateus and Leo
Follow up in 48 hours

Attached customer reference from similar SaaS company that improved forecast accuracy by 42% in first six months. Requested confirmation on contract review timeline.

questions_asked.question: What's the timeline for legal and finance review on your end?
questions_asked.answer: Riley will loop in finance this week. Hoping to have answer by end of next week.
